form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.56) when second at Maitland in a Grade 5. Has one success and seven minors from nine starts from box 1. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (22.56) when second at Maitland in a Grade 5. Has one success and seven minors from nine starts from box 1. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 11 over 340m at this track behind Coco Mac beaten 5.5 lengths (20.09). Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 4/5 on April 11 over 340m at this track behind Coco Mac beaten 5.5 lengths (20.09). Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began moderately; Was checked soon after the start; Finished the race strongly.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (19.83) at this track over 340m. Has a strong 19.65 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.74) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 2 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room in the back straight and lost ground.
Checked off heels in the back straight and again rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (19.96) over 340m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.comment: Finished second last start (19.96) over 340m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (20.25) in a Grade 5, finishing a one length third. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks a place chance at best.

Lost momentum at the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a swift 19.64 over the 340m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a swift 19.64 over the 340m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

form.formComment: Won his last couple, most recently at this track on April 8 over 340m in 19.45 and showed promise. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last couple, most recently at this track on April 8 over 340m in 19.45 and showed promise. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and lost considerable ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 20.17, beating Sunnybrook. Last start finished 5th over 340m at this track beaten 6 lengths (19.97) behind Maybe Yes in a Grade 5 on April 11. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.64. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 431m at this track at Grade 5 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
